# Temperature Survey

**Summary**: A method to measure temperature variations along a wellbore to identify anomalies like leaks or gas entry.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] used temperature surveys to detect potential leak locations in tubing and packers.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The primary analysis of temperature survey shows possible leaks in the following areas of well-A: two leaks in the tubing, and one in the packer. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 31]])
